overview.about: Christ the Redeemer (Cristo Redentor) atop Corcovado Mountain in Rio de Janeiro stands 38 metres tall and weighs 635 tonnes. The Art Deco statue was constructed in pieces in France and transported to Brazil. Inaugurated in 1931, it has become the symbol of Brazil and one of the New Seven Wonders of the World.

highlights.label: New Seven Wonders of the World
highlights.desc: Completed in 1931 and voted a New Wonder in 2007 — one of the most recognised statues in the entire world

highlights.label: 710m Summit View Over Rio
highlights.desc: From Corcovado, the full sweep of Guanabara Bay, Sugarloaf Mountain and Copacabana beach unfolds below you

highlights.label: Arms Spanning 28 Metres Wide
highlights.desc: The outstretched arms seem to embrace all of Rio — the most iconic and replicated skyline shot in Latin America

highlights.label: Art Deco Masterwork — 635 Tonnes
highlights.desc: Built from reinforced concrete clad in soapstone tiles — each tile hand-cut in France and shipped to Rio

overview.about: Iguaçu Falls in Foz do Iguaçu, BR captures the lively soul of Brazil — a country of extraordinary natural beauty, vibrant culture and infectious energy. This remarkable natural wonder destination blends tropical landscapes, rich heritage and the warm hospitality that makes Brazil one of the world's most beloved travel destinations.

highlights.label: Biodiversity Hotspot
highlights.desc: Home to rare and endemic species — flora and fauna found nowhere else on the planet within pristine ecosystems

highlights.label: World-Renowned Trekking
highlights.desc: Trails from leisurely nature walks to multi-day high-altitude expeditions with breathtaking panoramic rewards

highlights.label: Wildlife Encounters
highlights.desc: Spot iconic wildlife in their natural habitat — guided walks dramatically increase sighting rates of rare species

highlights.label: Dramatic Natural Landscapes
highlights.desc: Awe-inspiring vistas of mountains, gorges, waterfalls and geological formations sculpted over millions of years

overview.about: Copacabana Beach in Rio de Janeiro, BR captures the lively soul of Brazil — a country of extraordinary natural beauty, vibrant culture and infectious energy. This remarkable beach paradise destination blends tropical landscapes, rich heritage and the warm hospitality that makes Brazil one of the world's most beloved travel destinations.

highlights.label: Pristine Award-Winning Shores
highlights.desc: Crystal-clear azure waters fringing powder-white sands — consistently ranked among the world's most stunning coastlines

highlights.label: Premier Water Sports Hub
highlights.desc: Snorkelling, scuba diving, surfing and sailing in ideal conditions — equipment and instructors available year-round

highlights.label: Exceptional Sunset Views
highlights.desc: Catch the sky blaze in vivid gold and pink as the sun sets over the horizon — cited as a life-changing moment

highlights.label: Protected Marine Ecosystem
highlights.desc: Vibrant coral reefs, sea turtles and tropical fish — responsible tourism preserves these habitats for generations

overview.about: Sugarloaf Mountain in Rio de Janeiro, BR captures the lively soul of Brazil — a country of extraordinary natural beauty, vibrant culture and infectious energy. This remarkable mountain destination destination blends tropical landscapes, rich heritage and the warm hospitality that makes Brazil one of the world's most beloved travel destinations.

highlights.label: Awe-Inspiring Peaks
highlights.desc: Stand beneath peaks that pierce the clouds — some of the highest, most dramatic mountain ranges on the planet

highlights.label: World-Class Trekking Routes
highlights.desc: Legendary trails traversing alpine meadows, glacial passes and ancient shepherd paths used for centuries

highlights.label: Snow Adventures
highlights.desc: Skiing, snowboarding and ice-trekking on slopes that remain covered well into spring and summer months

highlights.label: Sunrise Panoramas
highlights.desc: Golden hour from high-altitude viewpoints paints surrounding valleys in colours no photograph fully captures
